methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Syria dominates border activity with Tadamon massacre arrest and Roj camp departures.
bullets: Syrian authorities arrested Amjad Youssef, the main suspect in the 2013 Tadamon massacre.
Australian nationals departed Roj camp in Syria following a previous failed repatriation attempt.
The United States enforced restrictions on Armenian Genocide recognition for the sixth time.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor diplomatic friction between Armenia and Turkiye regarding genocide recognition.
